free_text: Yields of delayed neutron precursors in the fission
Battery of 24 BF3 counters in a water tank.
Method of incremental deconvolution, see REL-REF of
ERR-T -> DATA-ERR in all data Subents.
Thermal neutron spectrum of the reactor
Data were normalized to the yield of the first delayed
neutron group (Y1=0.06+-0.005) taking acount of the
difference between decay constant of first group
Decay constant and yield used for normalization.
